offer: For family practice doctors processing 50–100 patients/month, inefficient tracking causes delayed patient follow-ups. We provide wellness report summaries instead of manual tracking and report generation.
problem: Inability to efficiently track patient appointment history and generate wellness reports.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for family practice doctors
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to family practice doctors with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among doctors
try_it: Let users try manual entry of patient appointment history
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing patient data
